answer: Invocations of fetch() or XMLHttpRequest, Web Fonts, WebGL textures, Images/video frames drawn to a canvas using drawImage(), CSS Shapes from images

A simple request is one that meets all the following conditions, although the specific conditions are not listed in the provided snippet, it is mentioned that the conditions are discussed in the context of the Fetch spec and the obsolete CORS spec.
The browser will block access to the response, and report a CORS error in the devtools console.
